scripts.test:integration: uv run vitest run tests/ts/backend.test.ts tests/ts/streaming_call.test.ts --passWithNoTests --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && uv run vitest run tests/ts/integration.test.ts tests/ts/sse.test.ts --passWithNoTests --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:e2e:live: pnpm build && uv run vitest run tests/ts/sse_live.test.ts --passWithNoTests --no-file-parallelism && uv run pytest -o addopts= tests/python/e2e_live -m live
scripts.lint:python: uv run ruff check backend/src tests/python
scripts.verify: uv run ruff check backend/src tests/python && uv run pytest && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
